title: Raw Ore Blocks Smelting
description: Smelt or blast raw ore blocks into refined blocks! This datapack lets you convert Raw Iron, Raw Gold, and Raw Copper Blocks into Iron, Gold, and Copper Blocks using furnaces or blast furnaces.
body:
This datapack adds a simple but useful feature to Minecraft: the ability to smelt or blast raw ore blocks into their refined ore block forms.
Just place a Raw Iron, Raw Gold, or Raw Copper Block into a furnace or blast furnace, and you’ll get the corresponding refined block.

Supported Conversions:
	•	Raw Iron Block → Iron Block
	•	Raw Gold Block → Gold Block
	•	Raw Copper Block → Copper Block

Perfect for automation, storage optimization, or simplifying your ore-processing workflow.
